home.feature2Desc: Vymažte dáta z počítačov, mobilných zariadení, serverov a cloudového úložiska z jednej platformy

home.reason1Desc: Odstraňovanie dát na úrovni vedúcej v odvetví s regulovanou súladnosťou so všetkými hlavnými štandardmi
home.reason2Desc: 24/7 viacjazyčný podporný tím pripravený pomôcť vám kdekoľvek na svete
home.reason3Desc: Navrhnuté na spracovanie miliónov zariadení s cloud-native architektúrou
home.reason4Desc: Bezpečnostné štandardy na úrovni armádnej ochrany s medzinárodnými predpismi
home.testimonialsSubtitle: Pridajte sa k tisíckam spokojných zákazníkov po celom svete
home.testimonial1Quote: D-Secure zmenil spôsob, akým spravujeme bezpečnosť dát. Len samotné reportovanie súladu nám ušetrilo nespočet hodín.
home.testimonial2Quote: Najlepšie riešenie na vymazávanie údajov, ktoré sme kedy použili. Ľahké nasadenie, spoľahlivé a podporný tím je vynikajúci.
home.testimonial3Quote: Súlad s GDPR jednoduchý. Automatizované pracovné procesy D-Secure zefektívnili celé riadenie životného cyklu našich údajov.
home.ctaSubtitle: Pridajte sa k tisíckam organizácií, ktoré chránia svoje citlivé informácie s D-Secure
home.ctaNote: Nie je potrebná kreditná karta • 30-dňová bezplatná skúšobná verzia
home.industriesSubtitle: Od zdravotnej starostlivosti po financie, od vlády po podniky – naše špecializované pracovné postupy zabezpečujú súlad s predpismi a bezpečnosť vo všetkých sektoroch.
home.healthcareDesc: Zničenie údajov v súlade s HIPAA s protokolmi špecifickými pre PHI pre lekárske zariadenia a systémy EMR.
home.financialDesc: Bezpečnosť na úrovni bánk so súladom s požiadavkami SOX a PCI DSS pre obchodné systémy a ochranu údajov zákazníkov.
home.governmentDesc: Súlad s NIST 800-88, DoD 3/7 pass a Common Criteria pre federálne agentúry.
home.enterpriseDesc: Komplexné vymazávanie dát v dátových centrách podporujúce migrácie do cloudu a správu koncových zariadení vo veľkom meradle.
home.itadDesc: Kompletné pracovné toky likvidácie majetku s automatizovaným spracovaním pre opätovný predaj, recykláciu a súlad s predpismi.
home.serviceProvidersDesc: Biele označenie značky s viacnásobnou správou klientov a programami zdieľania príjmov pre MSP.
home.servicesSubtitle: Odstránenie dát vojenskej úrovne naprieč všetkými platformami - od jednotlivých zariadení po podnikové siete a cloudovú infraštruktúru.
home.driveEraserDesc: Softvér na bezpečné vymazávanie diskov - vymazanie pevného disku, SSD, PC, notebooku, Mac® a servera. Nasadenie cez USB a PXE Boot na podporovaných zariadeniach.
home.driveEraserPriceNote: Licencie na platbu podľa použitia, ktoré nikdy neexpirova
home.fileEraserDesc: Softvér na mazanie súborov a priečinkov - vymazanie súborov z Windows, Mac a Linux systémov. Tiež vymazanie serverov a dát na počítačoch pripojených k doménovej sieti.
home.fileEraserPriceNote: Viacero plánov: Základný, Štandard, Cloud, Sieť, Pro a Enterprise
home.trustedSubtitle: D-Secure sa stal globálnym štandardom pre bezpečné vymazávanie dát, chráni milióny zariadení a slúži najbezpečnejším organizáciám na svete.
home.militaryGradeDesc: Metódy vymazávania v súlade s DOD 5220.22-M a NIST 800-88 s validáciou Common Criteria EAL 4+.
home.enterpriseScaleDesc: Spracujte až 500 serverov a 100 zariadení za hodinu pomocou automatizovaných pracovných postupov a centralizovaného riadenia.
home.globalComplianceDesc: Splňte GDPR, HIPAA, SOX a 20+ ďalších medzinárodných noriem s automatickým reportovaním zhody.
home.testimonial1: Potrebovali sme spoľahlivé riešenie na vymazanie údajov pre náš startup. D-Secure predstihol naše očakávania svojím intuitívnym rozhraním a komplexnými bezpečnostnými funkciami.
home.testimonial2: Ako skorý používateľ som ohromený inovatívnym prístupom D-Secure k bezpečnosti údajov. Tím je pohotový a produkt sa neustále zlepšuje.
home.testimonial3: Nový pohľad D-Secure na vymazávanie údajov je presne to, čo trh potrebuje. Jednoduché, bezpečné a vytvorené s ohľadom na moderné štandardy súladu.

solutions.caseStudy1Solution: Nasadené riešenie D-Secure Healthcare s automatizovanými protokolmi špecifickými pre PHI a reportovaním súladu viacerých regiónov pre bezproblémové nasadenie.
solutions.caseStudy1Results: Dosiahnutá 100% zhoda za 10 týždňov, zníženie manuálnych procesov o 85%, žiadne porušenia údajov počas prechodu
solutions.caseStudy2Challenge: Štátna banka potrebovala dátovú sanitáciu v súlade s PCI DSS naprieč dátovými centrami, uttagsautomatmi a pobočkovými systémami pri zachovaní prevádzky 24/7.
solutions.caseStudy2Solution: Implementované D-Secure Enterprise s automatizovaným riadením životného cyklu, možnosťou diaľkového vymazania a monitorovaním súladu v reálnom čase.
solutions.caseStudy2Results: Žiadne prestoje v prevádzke, príprava auditu o 95% rýchlejšia, ročná úspora nákladov 1,8 milióna USD vďaka automatizácii
solutions.caseStudy3Challenge: Poskytovateľ ITAD spracúvajúci mesačne viac ako 100 firemných zariadení potreboval škálovateľné riešenie na súčasné zvládnutie viacerých požiadaviek klienta na súlad.
solutions.caseStudy3Solution: Nasadená platforma D-Secure ITAD s viacnásobnou architektúrou, automatizovanou generáciou regulácií a možnosťami hromadného spracovania.
solutions.caseStudy3Results: Zvýšenie kapacity spracovania zariadení o 300%, 99,9% spokojnosť klientov, automatizované fakturácie znížili administratívne náklady o 60%
solutions.heroSubtitle: Špecializované pracovné postupy, rámce súladu a nástroje na vytváranie správ navrhnuté pre jedinečné požiadavky vášho odvetvia. Od súladu s HIPAA v zdravotníctve po štandardy PCI DSS vo financiách.

driveEraser.faq1Q: How many drives can I erase at a time on one machine?
driveEraser.faq1A: D-Secure Drive Eraser supports simultaneous erasure of up to 32 drives per machine, depending on your hardware configuration. For bulk operations, you can use our cloud console to manage multiple machines.
driveEraser.faq2Q: Does the software support Partition Deletion Wipe?
driveEraser.faq2A: Yes, D-Secure supports partition-level erasure in addition to full drive erasure. You can selectively wipe specific partitions while keeping others intact.
driveEraser.faq3A: No, D-Secure is designed with a user-friendly interface. Simply boot from USB, select your drive and erasure standard, and the software handles everything automatically.
driveEraser.faq4Q: Can I sign my file, like XML, jar file with my e-Signature?
driveEraser.faq4A: Yes, D-Secure supports custom digital signatures for reports. You can integrate your organization's PKI for enhanced security.
driveEraser.faq5A: Yes, D-Secure offers native integration with ServiceNow via REST APIs. You can automatically update CMDB records and create incident tickets upon erasure completion.
driveEraser.faq6Q: Can I track separate Inventory for different types of Drives (SSD/HDD, Mobile, etc)?
driveEraser.faq6A: Absolutely. The cloud console provides detailed categorization and filtering by device type, making it easy to track and report on different asset categories.
driveEraser.faq7A: We provide continuous support including regular software updates, technical assistance, compliance monitoring, and renewal coordination. Think of us as your ongoing partner in data hygiene.

questions.q1: What is the D-Secure Assurance Badge?
questions.a1: The D-Secure Assurance Badge is our certification that confirms your organization has implemented proper data hygiene processes. It's not just a certificate - it's our guarantee that you have the complete setup, processes, and discipline to keep data safe and secure.
questions.q2: How long does the certification process take?
questions.a2: The typical certification process takes 2-4 weeks, depending on your organization's size and readiness. This includes assessment, implementation support, and final verification.
questions.q3: What are the prerequisites for certification?
questions.a3: Organizations must implement D-Secure data hygiene tools including our automated eraser system, Free Space Wipe. We provide complete guidance on setup and implementation.
questions.a4: We conduct both scheduled and random audits to verify compliance. This includes checking erasure logs, process documentation, and system configurations. Our automated tools make this process seamless and non-intrusive.
questions.a5: We provide continuous support including regular software updates, technical assistance, compliance monitoring, and renewal coordination. Think of us as your ongoing partner in data hygiene.

manual.aboutDesc1: D-Secure File Eraser is a complete solution to maintain your computer privacy by erasing unwanted information from the computer. Erased data is beyond recovery. D-Secure File Eraser can be used to erase files/folders, Unused space, and System traces.
manual.aboutDesc2: D-Secure File Eraser erases files & folders completely from the hard drive. You can select multiple files/folders at a time for erasure. Once files/folders from the drive are erased using D-Secure File Eraser data can't be recovered back. The software allows you to generate and save the reports of the completed erasure process.
manual.aboutDesc3: In addition, it can erase unused space completely such that all the traces of previously stored data are completely removed. When you delete data from a hard drive, the data content is not deleted entirely, instead the space occupied by the data is marked as unused space and the new data is written on that unused space.
manual.aboutDesc4: D-Secure File Eraser also erases all the system traces. Operating systems store records of all activities such as browsing Internet and opening documents constantly.
manual.aboutDesc5: D-Secure File Eraser has a set of 20+ different erasure algorithms, that are accepted globally, to ensure permanent data deletion. You can choose any of the algorithms for erasure process. The software is menu driven, simple to use with an intuitive interface, and requires no prior technical skill.

manual.featureEraseSpaceDesc: - Option to erase the free space to secure privacy from the selected volumes.
manual.featureScheduleDesc: - Supports schedule erasing tasks to run them automatically at specified periods.
manual.featureReportsDesc: - Option to generate and save 100% secure and tamper-proof erasure reports in various formats such as PDF
manual.featureReportSettingsDesc: - Option to customise the reports before saving the report.
manual.featureSearchReportDesc: - Option to search reports by selecting the appropriate date range or erasure type.
manual.featurePreviewReportDesc: - Option to preview the report before saving.
manual.featureSaveCloudDesc: - Automatic report uploaded to D-Secure Cloud Console.
manual.featureStandards: Supported Erasure Standards and Verification Methods
manual.featureStandardsDesc: - Provides 20+ different erasing algorithms with 3 verification methods to erase the data permanently.
manual.featureSearchEraseDesc: - Option to search specific files using name or extension on the system and erase them using a suitable algorithm.
manual.featureThemesDesc: - Option to switch between light and dark modes.

manual.faq1A: D-Secure File Eraser is a professional-grade data erasure tool that permanently deletes files, folders, and traces from your system, making them unrecoverable by any means.
manual.faq2A: No, once data is erased using D-Secure File Eraser with any of the supported algorithms, the data is permanently and irrecoverably destroyed.
manual.faq3A: D-Secure File Eraser supports Windows 10/11, macOS 10.15+, and major Linux distributions.
manual.faq4Q: How many erasure algorithms are available?
manual.faq4A: The software includes 20+ internationally accepted erasure algorithms including DoD 5220.22-M, NIST 800-88, Gutmann, and others.
manual.faq5Q: Can I erase cloud storage data?
manual.faq5A: Yes, D-Secure File Eraser supports Google Drive erasure. You can securely delete files, folders, or entire cloud storage volumes.
manual.faq6A: Yes, tamper-proof PDF reports are automatically generated after each erasure operation. Reports can be saved locally or uploaded to D-Secure Cloud.
manual.faq7A: Yes, the Scheduler feature allows you to set up automated erasure tasks with customizable frequency (once, daily, weekly, monthly) and timing.
manual.faq8Q: Does the software support multiple themes?
manual.faq8A: Yes, you can switch between light and dark mode themes for comfortable viewing.

dataGuardian.faq1Q: What is the D-Secure Assurance Badge?
dataGuardian.faq1A: The D-Secure Assurance Badge is our certification that confirms your organization has implemented proper data hygiene processes. It's not just a certificate - it's our guarantee that you have the complete setup, processes, and discipline to keep data safe and secure.
dataGuardian.faq2Q: How long does the certification process take?
dataGuardian.faq2A: The typical certification process takes 2-4 weeks, depending on your organization's size and readiness. This includes assessment, implementation support, and final verification.
dataGuardian.faq3Q: What are the prerequisites for certification?
dataGuardian.faq3A: Organizations must implement D-Secure data hygiene tools including our automated eraser system, Free Space Wipe. We provide complete guidance on setup and implementation.
dataGuardian.faq4A: We conduct both scheduled and random audits to verify compliance. This includes checking erasure logs, process documentation, and system configurations. Our automated tools make this process seamless and non-intrusive.
dataGuardian.faq5A: We provide continuous support including regular software updates, technical assistance, compliance monitoring, and renewal coordination. Think of us as your ongoing partner in data hygiene.

faq.q1: Is the erased data really unrecoverable?
faq.a1: Yes. D-Secure File Eraser uses advanced overwriting techniques that make data recovery impossible even with specialized forensic tools.
faq.a2: We provide full support for Windows 10/11, macOS 10.15+, and all major Linux distributions (Ubuntu, Fedora, CentOS, etc.).
faq.q3: Can I erase data from Google Drive?
faq.a3: Yes, our Cloud Eraser feature allows you to securely delete files and folders from your Google Drive with the same high-security standards.
faq.q4: How do I get the erasure reports?
faq.a4: Reports are automatically generated as PDFs after each operation. You can save them locally or upload them to your D-Secure Cloud account.
